mnemonics: CIA: Check, Implement, Analyze - The three core steps for your Continuous Internal Assessment.
keyPoints: Focus on practical application of Python data science libraries (Pandas, NumPy, Matplotlib)
Correct implementation and interpretation of results is more important than just code syntax
Projects should demonstrate the full data analysis pipeline from data loading to visualization
commonMistakes: Submitting code with syntax errors or runtime exceptions
Focusing only on code without proper data interpretation or conclusions
Using inefficient methods for data manipulation instead of optimized Pandas/NumPy operations
